response.justification: Bogdan brings over 24 years of broad software engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial spirit, with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role demands director-level strategic advisory capabilities, recognized AI thought leadership, and deep cloud platform expertise — none of which are clearly evidenced. His AI work appears tooling-adjacent rather than strategic or ML-centric, his cloud depth is minimal (a brief AWS CDK mention), and there is no record of advising enterprise customers or partners on AI/cloud adoption at the executive level required by this position.
strengths: 24+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and infrastructure domains, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq demonstrates current engagement with agentic AI workflows and developer tooling for AI systems
Consistent entrepreneurial and community engagement track record: founding GISCollective, open-source library authorship, and delivering public workshops and conference talks
concerns: No evidence of director-level strategic influence, executive advisory engagements, or thought leadership at the organizational scale this role requires
AI expertise is narrow and tooling-focused; no demonstrated ML/AI product strategy, cloud AI platform work, or recognized external authority in AI (publications, keynotes, industry recognition)
Cloud depth is essentially absent — a single AWS CDK mention in one role, with no cloud architecture, platform strategy, or hyperscaler experience visible across the resume

key_factors.factor: Long tenure and breadth of engineering experience
